header: S. S. da Grama (SP) / Pocos de Caldas (MG)

lesson.menu_desc: Ordering & Food Culture -- Would like + Countable/Uncountable -- 28 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 5 -- Table Talk -- Ordering & Food Culture
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Tuca Dias | Aula 5 -- Table Talk

listenings.text: Hi Tuca, it's Mateo. You asked me where to eat tonight, so here is my favorite Mexican place, El Farolito, just two blocks from your hotel. Trust me on the food. To start, order the guacamole appetizer; it comes with warm tortilla chips and it is incredible. For the main course, the chicken tacos are the best in town, but if you like spicy food, try the enchiladas. They always ask if you would like a side dish, so say yes to the rice and beans. For a beverage, the fresh lime water is very refreshing, much better than soda. Leave room for dessert, because the churros are amazing. One tip: the service is slow, so relax and enjoy. When you finish, ask for the bill and leave a small tip for the server. Send me a photo of your plate!

Hey, it's Tuca. I just had dinner at El Farolito and it was wonderful. I followed your recommendation completely. I started with the guacamole appetizer, and the tortilla chips were so fresh. For the main course I ordered the chicken tacos, and I asked for rice and beans as a side dish. The server asked if I would like something spicy, so I tried a little of the green sauce; the flavor was perfect, not too hot. For a beverage I had the lime water, and you were right, it was very refreshing. Of course I could not skip dessert, so I had the churros. When the bill came, I left a good tip because the server was so kind. Honestly, the food here is so different from ours back at the farm. Next time you have to come with me!

extra_audio.text: Tuca arrives at the Mexican restaurant and the server gives her a menu. She asks the server for a recommendation. The server suggests the guacamole and the chicken tacos. Tuca orders her main course and a refreshing beverage. After the meal, she asks for the bill and leaves a tip for the server.
